title: Go-to-Market Consulting Services | Catalyst Inc.
seo_description: Expert Go-to-Market strategy consulting. Proven 6-step GTM framework to launch products and accelerate revenue growth. Free consultation available.

strategies.source: Source: “25 Statistics to Influence Your 2025 GTM Plan” by Devrix
strategies.percentage_text_1: of U.S. companies have already defined

market.q1: Do you have a clearly defined Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) with specific criteria?
market.q2: Do you regularly analyze market size, growth trends, and competitive positioning?

operations.q1: Are sales, marketing, and customer service working together effectively?
operations.q2: Are cross-departmental KPIs unified, and are we moving toward shared goals?

velocity.q1: Do you track key velocity metrics like lead-to-opportunity and deal cycle times?
velocity.q2: Are your sales and marketing processes optimized for predictable revenue growth?

expansion.q1: Are you implementing upselling/cross-selling strategies for existing customers?
expansion.q2: Do you have plans to expand into new markets or channels?

challenges.title: Why GTM Fails
challenges.subtitle: Please select at least one challenge that applies to your organization.

feedback.allCategoriesScoredWell: You scored well across all categories. There are no critical areas requiring improvement.
feedback.focusOnImprovements: Focus on areas marked with ★1 and ★2 to achieve the greatest impact on your GTM strategy.
feedback.nextStepsDescription: Start by focusing on high-priority items. Create an action plan with a clear timeline and measurable outcomes.

language.changeMessage: Changing the language will reset your current progress. Do you want to continue?

highPriority: Align internally on why customers choose your company

summary.keyFocusAreas: Market analysis, sales and marketing alignment
summary.strengthsToLeverage: Data analytics capabilities, sales team collaboration
summary.recommendedTopics: Internal alignment, optimization of improvement cycles

gtmChallenges.challenge1: Functions are siloed, with no shared KPIs
gtmChallenges.challenge2: Revenue and pipeline forecasts are unreliable
gtmChallenges.challenge3: Differentiation is weak, competing mainly on price or features
gtmChallenges.challenge4: Customer ROI and outcomes are unclear, making renewals and expansion difficult
gtmChallenges.challenge5: Deal management and tracking are inconsistent, with low repeatability
gtmChallenges.challenge6: Over-reliance on new customer acquisition; existing account growth is stagnant
gtmChallenges.challenge7: Success stories and learnings are not shared, reducing organizational repeatability
gtmChallenges.challenge8: Initiatives are ad-hoc and short-term, with no continuous improvement cycle
gtmChallenges.challenge9: Market share is being lost to competitors
gtmChallenges.challenge10: Expansion into new markets or channels lacks preparation and stalls
gtmChallenges.challenge11: The business has hit a scaling wall, with no clear next growth driver
gtmChallenges.challenge12: Gap between leadership's strategy and frontline execution
